Wait Times for Priority Procedures in Canada, 2008 to 2024 — Data Tables

This indicator provides wait times and volumes for priority procedures between 2008 and 2024. Wait times and volumes are provided at national, provincial and regional levels for 2 procedures: hip replacement and knee replacement. Hip and knee replacement data for 2008 to 2023 is reported overall. Hip and knee replacement data for 2024 is reported overall, by age group, by reported sex or gender, and by urban versus rural/remote area.

Wait times for hip fracture repair are calculated using the Discharge Abstract Database (DAD) and National Ambulatory Care Reporting System (NACRS) at the Canadian Institute for Health Information (CIHI). For all other procedures, aggregate wait time results are submitted to CIHI by provincial ministries and agencies. For detailed information on wait time definitions, please refer to the wait times metadata web page.
